overview.description: The fundX Flexible ETF (XFLX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that seeks total return through a portfolio of fixed income securities perceived to be in sync with market leaders. The fund invests in US and non-US bonds of any credit quality and maturity. XFLX was launched on Jan 7, 2002 and is issued by FundX.
